Class GameManager

java.lang.Object
scorefour.controller.GameManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Updatable
public class GameManager extends Object implements Updatable
A GameManager handles the game moves, scoreboard, and win checks.

    Handles each move by checking if the game has been won, if not it switches the turns.

    Resets each players score to 0.

    Resets the game and score when the score reaches a limit.

    • GameManager

      public GameManager(Board board, Player whitePlayer, Player blackPlayer, AudioController audioController)

      Parameters:
      board - a Board to check for wins
      whitePlayer - a Player
      blackPlayer - a Player
